headline: Royal Caribbean (RCL) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: Royal Caribbean (RCL) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Royal Caribbean (RCL) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Royal Caribbean (RCL) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?
